subtopic: RBI Monetary Policy and Surplus Management
rationale: Covers RBI monetary policy instruments (quantitative and qualitative), the surplus transfer mechanism to the government, and the management of gold and forex reserves.
Groups the RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme with liquidity management tools like SDF and fiscal-monetary coordination tools like Ways and Means Advances (WMA).
Focuses on the regulatory framework for Self-Regulatory Organizations (SROs), NBFC definitions, and the 'One State One RRB' amalgamation policy.

subtopic: Small Finance Banks and PSL Norms
rationale: Details the transition of SFBs to Universal Banks and the significant changes in Priority Sector Lending (PSL) requirements for SFBs.
Covers the SARFAESI Act, global messaging standards (SWIFT), India Post Payments Bank, and risk indicators like CAR and FRI.
Groups the FRBM Act targets and CAG findings with the conceptual definitions of various fiscal deficits and the basic Indian tax structure.
Covers the Income Tax Act 2025, MAT/AMT provisions, Virtual Digital Assets, and international taxation concepts like Transfer Pricing and APAs.
Focuses on GST rate rationalization, the median tax rate shift, and administrative reforms like GSTAT and simplified registration.
Explains trade protectionist measures (Anti-Dumping, Safeguard Duty) and the mechanism of off-budget borrowings by the government.
Compares Money vs Capital markets and details SEBI-regulated investment vehicles like REITs, InvITs, and Alternative Investment Funds (AIFs).
Covers the GIFT City IFSC framework, the Foreign Currency Settlement System, and specialized debt instruments like Transition and AT1 Bonds.
Groups the UPI/NPCI infrastructure and its international expansion with the significance of Sovereign Credit Ratings.
Compares FDI vs FPI, details FDI prohibited sectors, and explains the regulatory framework for FPI-to-FDI reclassification.
Covers Vostro/Nostro accounts, currency convertibility, REER/NEER concepts, and India's remittance landscape including the LRS.
Details the India-UK FTA (including the Double Contributions Convention) and the India-EFTA Trade and Economic Partnership Agreement (TEPA).
Focuses on export statistics and the Credit Guarantee Scheme for Exporters (CGSE) implemented via NCGTC.
Combines microeconomic price elasticity concepts with the methodology and comparison of PPI, WPI, and CPI.
Covers the Global and National Multidimensional Poverty Indices (MPI) and global/national inequality trends including the Kuznets Ratio.
Groups the RBI Financial Inclusion Index with the structure, composition, and legal framework of India's public and external debt.
Covers the AMRUT 2.0 urban mission and the official MoSPI methodology for calculating GDP and GVA in India.
Compares Capital vs Revenue expenditure and details the dimensions of the Human Development Index (HDI) and Gender Inequality Index (GII).
Details the PM Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) and the newly launched PM Dhan Dhaanya Krishi Yojana (PMDDKY) for small farmers.
Covers the modernization of command area development (M-CADWM) and the operational strategy for pulses production under PM-AASHA.
Groups the National Turmeric Board, MS Swaminathan's legacy, and specific crop profiles for Makhana, Silk, Cotton, and Opium.
Covers the BHARATI agritech initiative, digital warehousing (Bhandaran 360), Kisan Credit Card (KCC), and UN International Years.
Comprehensive coverage of the four new Labour Codes: Wages, Industrial Relations, Social Security, and Occupational Safety (OSHWC).
Focuses on the Periodic Labour Force Survey (PLFS) methodology and key indicators like LFPR, WPR, and UR.

subtopic: Skill Development and Global Capability Centres
rationale: Covers the Skill India Programme (PMKVY, NAPS), ITI modernization (PM-SETU), and the rise of Global Capability Centres (GCCs).
Distinguishes between Minimum Wage and Living Wage concepts and their constitutional/legal basis in India.
Groups the role of the Competition Commission of India (CCI) with the Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY) loan categories.
Covers India's performance in the Global Innovation Index (GII) 2025 and the 2025 Nobel Prize in Economic Sciences.
Details the IPR framework in India, corporate merger regulations under the Companies Act, and the concept of 'Reverse Flipping'.
Covers the Fugitive Economic Offenders Act, CSR registration rules, and the 'We Rise' initiative for women entrepreneurs.
Groups the status of Major/Non-Major ports with the Sagarmala Programme components and the Indian Ports Act 2025.
Focuses on the modernization of shipping acts and international environmental conventions like MARPOL and BWM.
Covers the Vizhinjam Deep-Water Port and road safety governance, including the Brasilia Declaration and the Cashless Treatment Scheme.
Groups aviation regulatory bodies (DGCA, BCAS, etc.) with the National Logistics Policy (NLP) 2022 and accident investigation frameworks.
Covers logistics indices (LEADS), digital platforms (ULIP), the National Monetization Pipeline (NMP), and the Digital India Mission.

subtopic: Strategic Projects and Services Sector Trends
rationale: Groups strategic rail/tunnel projects (USBRL, Chenab) with NITI Aayog's insights on GVA and employment trends in the services sector.
Details the Annual Survey of Industries (ASI), the Index of Industrial Production (IIP), and the new National Industrial Classification (NIC) 2025.
Covers the status of manufacturing, the semiconductor chip design ecosystem in India, and the Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS).

subtopic: Mineral Regulation and District Mineral Foundations
rationale: Focuses on the MMDR Act amendments, critical mineral auctions, and the governance/funding of District Mineral Foundations (DMF).

subtopic: Atomic Minerals and Critical Mineral Blocks
rationale: Covers offshore atomic mineral rules, geographical distribution of Uranium/Thorium, and the auction of Potash and Halite blocks.

subtopic: Natural Gas and Coal Sector Reforms
rationale: Groups natural gas reserve estimates and pipeline tariffs with coal sector sustainability initiatives and the SHAKTI policy.
Groups the New Steel Policy, PM MITRA (textiles), SEZ reforms, Quality Council of India (QCI), and the MedTech Mission (MAHA).
